name: builder
description: Spec-driven agentic implementation for Claude Code. Reads the explorer codebase memory as ground truth, plans a requested change with clarity + technical-plan gates, decomposes it into atomic edge-case-hardened tasks (micro-level precision), implements only what the spec says with a per-edit lint/type feedback loop and hybrid retrieval, runs hybrid QA, and keeps the durable memory in sync. Includes a reproduce-first BUG-FIX MODE that turns vague, repro-less bug reports into verified, regression-safe fixes via a failing reproduction + characterization tests + a deterministic regression gate.
